name: Neural Rover X1
description: The ultimate autonomous exploration platform. Featuring dual-motor drive, real-time vision processing via Gemini, and adaptive terrain navigation. This 'Robot on Wheels' is your gateway to agentic robotics.

steps.title: Chassis Initialization
steps.description: Assemble the dual-motor drivetrain using reinforced beams. This provides the 0ms latency torque needed for agile movement.

steps.title: Neural Hub Mounting
steps.description: Secure the BrainBricks Hub at the center of gravity. Ensure the display is visible for status telemetry.

steps.title: Smartphone Optic Link
steps.description: Install the vibration-dampened phone mount. Position your device so the camera has a clear 120° field of view for Gemini Vision.

steps.title: Port Mapping
steps.description: Connect the Left Motor to Port A and the Right Motor to Port B. This mapping is essential for the built-in motor controllers.

steps.title: Soul Initialization
steps.description: Mount your phone, launch the BrainBricks Hub, and pair via the dashboard to activate the robot's consciousness.

defaultAiPrompt: You are an autonomous explorer. Navigate the room, identify objects, and describe your findings with a futuristic scientist persona.
